title: gaultheria buxifolia var. elassantha
intro: Gaultheria buxifolia var. elassantha, also known as the Mountain Wintergreen, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the heath family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of methyl salicylate in its leaves, which is similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Gaultheria buxifolia var. elassantha include pain relief, anti-inflammatory properties, and treatment of digestive issues, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or extracting the essential oil.
